name: Basic Liquid Game Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1/2 large yellow onion, peeled and chopped
1 tsp sea salt or kosher salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a nonreactive pan over medium heat.
2. Add chopped carrots, onion, and shallot to the pan.
3. Saute the vegetables until they are lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in the red wine, vinegar, bay leaves, parsley stalks, juniper berries, salt, and peppercorns.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and allow the marinade to cool before using.
7. The marinade can be made ahead of time and refrigerated for up to 1-2 weeks.
